summary: Phase A Part 3 RETEST PASSED - Both fixes from iteration_76 verified: (1) Copy Public Link & Preview as Client buttons now visible for ALL stages in Partner Pipeline, (2) Pre-Assessments menu item added to Admin sidebar under 'Cases & Users' group
feature: Iteration 76 bug fixes verification - Partner pipeline buttons visibility + Admin sidebar navigation

partner_pipeline_buttons.test: Copy Public Link and Preview as Client buttons visibility across ALL stages
partner_pipeline_buttons.result: PASS - Both buttons visible for all 10 tested PA cards including: Case Created, Proposal Paid, New Lead, Payment Received, Docs Submitted stages

admin_sidebar_navigation.test: Pre-Assessments menu item in Admin sidebar navigates to PreAssessmentQueue
admin_sidebar_navigation.result: PASS - Menu item found under 'Cases & Users' group, clicking navigates to Pre-Assessment Queue page

admin_queue_stats.result: PASS - Found 6 cards: Total (36), 1st Review (3), Approved (0), Rejected (1), Awaiting Case (3), Conversion (19.4%)

admin_2nd_approval_ui.test: Finalize button and CM select dropdown for proposal_paid items
admin_2nd_approval_ui.result: PASS - 'Activate Case & Assign CM' button found, clicking shows CM assignment dropdown with 'Confirm — Create Case' button

regression_copy_link.test: Copy Public Link copies full URL (not just path)
regression_copy_link.result: PASS - Button clickable, success toast appears

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A Part 3 fixes from iteration_76 fully verified. Partner Pipeline now shows Copy Public Link and Preview as Client buttons for ALL stages (moved outside nextAction conditional). Admin Dashboard sidebar now has Pre-Assessments menu item under Cases & Users group that navigates to PreAssessmentQueue component with 6 stats cards and 2nd approval UI (CM assignment dropdown + Confirm Create Case button).
